case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LORENA MEDINA AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LORENA MEDINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LORENA MEDINA AGUILAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LORENA MEDINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED NOV-03-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, LORENA MEDINA
